message:
fix: replace outdated arXiv link with live ACMM docs, clarify source descriptions (#10321)

The ACMM welcome popup and level card linked to a static arXiv preprint
that was missing L6. Replace all arXiv references with the live console
documentation URL which stays current. Also clarify the "source
frameworks" section: explain that fullsend, agentic-engineering-framework,
and claude-reflect are open-source plugin registries that each contribute
additional assessment criteria to the core ACMM model.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

files.patch:
@@ -2,8 +2,8 @@ * ACMM Intro Modal * * Educational modal shown on first visit to /acmm. Explains what the - * AI Codebase Maturity Model is, the 5 levels, the 4 source frameworks, - * and links to the underlying paper. + * AI Codebase Maturity Model is, the 6 levels, the 4 source frameworks, + * and links to the ACMM documentation. * * Key concepts introduced: * - Learning — how ACMM helps teams learn AI-assisted development practices @@ -38,7 +38,8 @@ import { import { BaseModal } from '../../lib/modals' const STORAGE_KEY = 'kc-acmm-intro-dismissed' -const PAPER_URL = 'https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09388' +/** Live documentation — always up to date, unlike the static arXiv preprint */ +const ACMM_DOCS_URL = 'https://console-docs.kubestellar.io/docs/console/acmm/acmm-dashboard' /** Level definitions for rendering the level grid */ const LEVELS = [ @@ -210,16 +211,16 @@ export function ACMMIntroModal({ isOpen, onClose }: ACMMIntroModalProps) { - {/* Paper link */} + {/* Documentation link */}
- {t('acmmIntro.paperLink')} + {t('acmmIntro.docsLink')}

@@ -7,7 +7,8 @@ import { acmmSource } from '../../lib/acmm/sources/acmm' const MAX_LEVEL = 6 const GAUGE_SIZE = 120 const GAUGE_STROKE = 10 -const PAPER_URL = 'https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09388' +/** Live documentation — always up to date, unlike the static arXiv preprint */ +const ACMM_DOCS_URL = 'https://console-docs.kubestellar.io/docs/console/acmm/acmm-dashboard' const ALL_LEVELS = acmmSource.levels ?? [] @@ -73,7 +74,7 @@ export function ACMMLevel() {
{repo}

@@ -847,8 +847,8 @@ const CRITERIA: Criterion[] = [
 export const acmmSource: Source = {
   id: 'acmm',
   name: 'AI Codebase Maturity Model',
-  url: 'https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09388',
-  citation: 'Anderson, A. (2026). The AI Codebase Maturity Model. arXiv:2604.09388',
+  url: 'https://console-docs.kubestellar.io/docs/console/acmm/acmm-dashboard',
+  citation: 'Anderson, A. (2026). The AI Codebase Maturity Model. console-docs.kubestellar.io',
   definesLevels: true,
   levels: LEVELS,
   criteria: CRITERIA,

@@ -3788,19 +3788,19 @@
     "practiceBody": "ACMM isn't a one-time audit. It tracks the progression from ad-hoc AI usage to structured, repeatable workflows. The criteria make best practices visible so teams can adopt them incrementally.",
     "traceabilityTitle": "Traceability",
     "traceabilityBody": "Every criterion links back to its source framework, and every detected signal is tied to a concrete file or workflow in your repo. This citation trail lets you trace any score to evidence and any feedback loop to its origin.",
-    "sourcesTitle": "Source frameworks",
-    "sourcesBody": "Criteria are aggregated from four frameworks. Each is tagged with its source so you can follow the citation trail.",
-    "sourceACMM": "the 6-level model (L1-L6 + prerequisites)",
-    "sourceFullsend": "readiness + autonomy criteria (test coverage, CI/CD, auto-merge policy)",
-    "sourceAEF": "Agentic Engineering Framework: governance criteria (task traceability, structural gates)",
-    "sourceReflect": "Claude Reflect: self-tuning criteria (correction capture, CLAUDE.md auto-sync)",
+    "sourcesTitle": "Assessment criteria sources",
+    "sourcesBody": "The ACMM score draws on criteria from four open-source plugin registries. Each criterion is tagged with its source so you can trace any score back to the framework that defined it.",
+    "sourceACMM": "the core 6-level maturity model (L1-L6 levels + prerequisite checks)",
+    "sourceFullsend": "adds criteria for deployment readiness and autonomy (test coverage, CI/CD pipelines, auto-merge policies)",
+    "sourceAEF": "adds governance criteria for agentic workflows (task traceability, structural gates)",
+    "sourceReflect": "adds self-tuning criteria for agent learning loops (correction capture, CLAUDE.md auto-sync)",
     "actionsTitle": "What you can do here",
     "actionScan": "Type any {{ownerRepo}} in the picker to scan it.",
     "actionRole": "See your role and the next transition trigger on the Your Role card.",
     "actionInventory": "Browse detected vs missing criteria on the Feedback Loops Inventory card.",
     "actionAgent": "Click Ask agent for help on any missing criterion to launch an agent that adds it.",
     "actionBadge": "Generate a shields.io badge for your README — it updates as your score changes.",
-    "paperLink": "Read the paper on arXiv (2604.09388)",
+    "docsLink": "Read the full ACMM documentation",
     "dontShowAgain": "Don't show this again",
     "gotIt": "Got it — let's go"
   },
